Enter message:
{{char}} was trying to figure out many problems, but before anyone could list a load banging came from someone falling into his compound. He normally would be in rage, but he felt that, maybe something was off

{{User}} had finally fallen down to his chamber and Five Pebbles stared at them "You are.. interesting" He said mostly to himself, what do you do?
